prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移后的回调预期、2026年招生计划微幅缩招、安徽省考生总数略有减少以及学校稳定的工科强校声誉，预计2026年理科（物理类）最低 录取位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略缓解）。预测最低位次约4347名，区间3847–4847名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 3372 → 3641 → 3557 → 3293 → 4395. 2024 was the first year of the new Gaokao (physics category), with the ranking moving forward from 3557 in the previous year to 3293, but in 2025 it significantly moved back to 4395, a backward shift of about 1102 places, reflecting the impact of subject selection requirements (physics + chemistry) under the new Gaokao model on the application landscape. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4395. The provincial enrollment plan for science (physics category) was 144 in 2021, 149 in 2022, 149 in 2023, 144 in 2024, and 149 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 148, a slight decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a reduction of about 0.7%, which has limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranks 20th on the main list, with recent rankings stable in the 20–22 range, belonging to the top-tier universities in China. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management incidents (PPT disparaging other majors controversy, exam cheating handling controversy), with overall limited impact. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 66th (average), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no clear signal of increased application attention. There are no records of Tianjin University experiencing a cutoff in Anhui Province in historical admission anomalies. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 20 disciplines rated A- or above, among which Chemical Engineering and Technology, and Management Science and Engineering are rated A+, and Instrument Science and Technology, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Mechanical Engineering, and Water Conservancy Engineering are rated A, with extremely outstanding engineering strength, which has a sustained attraction for science candidates in Anhui Province. Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and its automation, and other engineering categories continue to be highly recommended, highly matching Tianjin University's advantageous engineering majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Anhui Province is about 451,000, a slight decrease compared to 2025 (physics category 320,800 + history category 141,400 ≈ 462,200), slightly easing competition pressure. The physics category undergraduate batch scores were 461 in 2025 and 465 in 2024, basically stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tianjin University is located in Tianjin, relatively close to Anhui Province, with convenient transportation and high recognition in the East China region. The university has a large enrollment scale in Anhui (about 148 in science), making it one of the more numerous out-of-province 985 universities enrolling in Anhui, with stable willingness of local candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the expected rebound after the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the slight decrease in the total number of candidates in Anhui Province, and the university's stable reputation as a strong engineering school, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly eases). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4347, with a range of 3847–4847.

If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (within 3847), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.
